faq.question: How does an AI builder differ from a regular website builder?
faq.answer: AI creates the structure, copy, and design automatically — you don't start with a blank page.

faq.question: Can I use my own domain with the builder?
faq.answer: Yes, connect your own domain in settings — available on paid plans.

faq.question: Does the builder support inventory management?
faq.answer: Yes, manage inventory in the editor — when stock reaches zero, the Buy button is automatically blocked.

faq.question: How do I connect an advertising pixel to the store?
faq.answer: Insert the pixel code in site settings — Promto supports Yandex.Metrica, VK Pixel, and Google Tag Manager.

faq.question: How many products can I add on the free plan?
faq.answer: Dozens of products are available on the free plan. Unlimited catalog on paid plans.

faq.question: Is there technical support for builder users?
faq.answer: Yes, support via chat and email is available to all users. Priority support on paid plans.

cta_mid_subtitle: Create a store in 5 minutes — AI does everything necessary for you.
